canonical_definition: A feature-inspection interface that displays maximally activating exemplars and direct effects for model features.
papers: Mechanistic Permutability: Match Features Across Layers

relationships.paper: Sparse Feature Circuits: Discovering and Editing Interpretable Causal Graphs in Language Models
relationships.evidence: We manually interpret each feature using the Neuronpedia interface (Lin & Bloom, 2023), which displays maximally activating dataset exemplars on a large text corpus, as the features’ direct effects on output logits.
